description_long: This house is a modern, boxy structure nestled within a landscaped environment featuring large boulders and dense coniferous trees. The building has a flat roof and a predominantly white facade, with multiple rectangular windows arranged in an asymmetrical pattern. The front of the house includes a driveway with two visible garage doors and a small entry path leading to the main entrance. The surrounding terrain is a mix of rocky outcrops and green foliage, giving the property a secluded, natural feel. The rear and sides of the house are bordered by more trees and rocks, providing privacy and blending the structure into its environment. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and integration with the landscape.
description: A modern, flat-roofed white house surrounded by rocks and dense pine trees, featuring large windows and a driveway with garage doors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, two garage doors, and the house set against rocks and pine trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rocky terrain, dense trees, and the house's white facade with fewer visible windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, more windows, and a continuation of the rocky and wooded landscape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the house partially obscured by trees and rocks, showing the integration with the natural environment.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with a small entry path, no porch, and minimal decorative elements, flanked by garage doors.
